title: Tera Marble Mortar and Pestle Set Large Solid Stone Grinder Spice Herb Grinder Pill Crusher (Black, Diameter 5.5")
description:
About this item
【Pure Natural Marble】Made of marble, this mortar and pestle set features a textured interior for improved friction when grinding and crushing. The polished surface of the jam pestle on the outer wall is smooth and beautiful, adding a decorative touch to both the kitchen and the table.It is lighter compared to a grinder of the same size made from granite!
【Unique existence】 Due to the change of the natural color of marble, each mortar and pestle is unique, (please allow a slight difference in the color ). The large mortar and pestle set is hand-grinded and polished, please allow dimensional errors. Product size is 5.5in x 2.83in x 2.7in.
【Easy to Clean】❤Please note: Due to its natural marble composition, there may be some powder initially. To fix this, grind 1/3 cup of uncooked rice in a mortar and pestle, then rinse and allow to air dry. After each use, simply rinse the pestle and mortar setthoroughly with a sponge and warm water - no odors will remain.
【Versatile】This robust marble mortar and pestle set is ideal for grinding dry and wet ingredients. It easily handles tasks like making homemade guacamole, pesto, and salsa, as well as easily crushing garlic, pepper, ginger, nuts, herbs, spices, and more. It allows you to fully enjoy the joy of handcrafted gourmet cooking.
【Product Includes】1x mortar, 1x pestle, exquisite and safe gift packaging. The packaging box contains foam padding to protect the marble mortar and pestle set. If you have any questions before or after your purchase, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are committed to providing you with satisfactory solutions.
reviews_5s:
I really like the color and the quality of this mortar and pestle. I haven’t used it since it’s a birthday present for a dear friend. He enjoys cooking and creating dishes, so I really feel like he’s going to appreciate the durability of this product. It was a great value for the money.This is a good, heavy mortar and pestle. Outside of the bowl measures 5 1/2 inches in diameter, inner edge is 4 1/4 inches diameter. I use it for grating dried herbs and eggshells, and it works well. Remember to "season" it first so you don't get little pieces of it in your food.This mortar works great. I use it from time to time while cooking. Overall build quality is very nice. I can tell I’ll be using this for a long time based on how well it’s constructed. Great product.Agree with some comments, its like a decorative item, Sturdy & Stylish and exactly as described.*Edit to update after use*
Worked wonderfully and cleaned up very well considering I had smashed garlic cloves, fresh basil, and chile powder into it. I then added hot olive oil directly into it to "fry." What a wonderful aroma that didn't get stuck to the tool. I can imagine after more uses it will take more effort to keep it fresh, but it cleaned right up with a bit of soap and a rinse. Nothing special needed even with staining and smelly spices :D
------------------------------
I haven't actually used it yet. I wasn't sure how to rate it on the "easy to clean" rating. It is as easy to clean as I think is possible considering its use. It has a rough surface inside and on the end of the pestle (necessary for optimal grind and smoosh) which will likely need a little more attention when cleaning, but relative to its function I don't think it could have been designed in a way that made it easier to clean. I am currently awaiting my peppers to grow and ripen before putting this to its full potential. Going to do some garlic in it tonight with dinner. As I said, I haven't used it yet, but its obviously a fine example of what I wanted and a good sturdy utensil. I believe I will use a diluted dawn and vinegar solution as a short soak on the rough sides for removing smell and flavor when using pungent spices.I needed a small mortar and pestle that was stone and this one fits perfectly. Great if you want to grind up some peppercorns, saffron, cumin seed etc. I was curious about the radioactivity of this granite (all granite has naturally occurring radioactivity).

My background is 0.07 μSv/h.
The mortar (4.6") is 0.11 μSv/h
My granite countertop is 0.26 μSv/h.

The meaning of these numbers is I live in a low radiation area, the mortar has very low radioactivity and I probably should not sleep on my granite counters.
Happy grinding, it's a keeper.Great look and doesn’t break easily as I’ve dropped it multiple times on accident still have mine and love itWhat I love about this mortar/pestle:
Everything! Size (inside depth & width), weight (stays in place during use), durability (what it's made of), size (fits in my hand comfortably), color (coordinates with my kitchen).
I used to have a set that was made of a lesser quality & the pestle broke. This was my replacement. I like it a lot.
Make sure you hand wash if you purchase. It cleanser up fast & easy.My wife loves it she says it's perfectI wasn’t even considering the possibility of being impressed by a mortar and pestle. It’s a mortar and pestle. But pulling this thing out of the box, I’m impressed. I’m not gonna be putting it away in a cabinet. It’s very impressive.
reviews_1s: These chipped while I was grinding my baby's medicine and if i didn't pay close attention, it would have been a serious hazard. Had to return it because it was not quite safe.I bought this set in July 2022,used 1 time and 2-nd time I wanted to use,take from the cabinet and pestle broke down in my hand,heavy part fell down and I damaged my finger.It terrible,you must send customer PPE to use such units.People,keep away from this setTHE MORTAR AND PESTLE BOTH CHIP BADLY WHEN USED. ESPECIALLY THE PESTLE. AND YOU CAN’T TELL THAT IT’S CHIPPING BECAUSE THE PESTLE PARTS MIX WITH WHATEVER YOU’RE MAKING. DO NOT BUY!can’tWhen I opened the package, it was broken! I missed the exchange window by a few days unfortunately due to having to work. I don’t know how it broke when it looked well packaged to me. I am pretty bummed!I bought this item strictly to grind up vitamins for my dogs, ive had it for about 2 weeks and the pestle broke right in half ! It doesn't get slammed around or used roughly, I don't recommend buying this !Broke during first use - grinding spices.This arrived cracked in half and also very dirty.Don’t buy it. Looks big in pic but it’s v tint. You can grind a single piece of garlic in itThis was purchased as a gift, but it looks and smells like it has been sitting in a musty old basement for a really long time. Certainly not gift worthy
